title: Meta Governance
description: Meta Governance designs authority flow and stabilization rules for human-AI systems. This domain is in active research — protocol specification is in progress.

what.title: What is Meta Governance?
what.description: The third functional domain of the Cognitive OS. While JDVP observes judgment movement and Thinkprint extracts reasoning patterns, Meta Governance designs how decision-making authority forms, flows, and stabilizes between people and AI agents.

status.title: Current Status
status.description: Meta Governance is in the research phase. We are developing the foundational protocol for authority architecture. Follow our progress on GitHub.
